subcodes.first_line: The Book Most Wondrous is for them that have believed in the Day of Return, when the Lord of Creation appeared through a transcendent Command. We have bestowed the choice wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب بدیع لمن آمن بیوم المعاد اذ ظهر مالک الایجاد بامر منیع قد بذلنا رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
